Housekeeping – Post homework in the copypro and fill out each assigned section so by the end
the copy will fil out.
3:15 – VSL breakdown
,pdf is in the classroom docs – go through and look for the elements of the hex and copy
Having a VSL that rolls alone has the capability of streaming income when done right. Jon
makes money for almost doing nothing after the work has been done. The affiliates sell since
they see conversion. – This is the power of killer copy
8:20 – Empathy and VSL contents
· 	You have tired __________ (product / service / action) with disappointing results
· 	You have a __________ (problem) that I see all of the time (you are not a weirdo – there
is hope)
· 	You have done __________, __________ and __________ with nothing to show for it,
I don’t blame you at all
The entire copy structure is mistaken beliefs and secondary complaints.
Verb structure – you are this, you are this, you are this
10:00
“Works even if” comes from mistaken beliefs
· 	Please understand __________ (problem) is not your fault
· 	However it is very easy to __________ (secondary complaint) in todays world
· 	This isnt your fault… and now there is something you can do to fix it (this isnt your fault
but now it is your responsibility)
12:00 - Hotseats:
Chris – A mentoring 8k project with 4 components
How to come up with a mistaken belief if something is brand new and never tried
· 	What have they used in the past that didn’t work – MLM
· 	Perhaps you tried __________ and it let you down, lets face it the __________ (product)
only works for __________ (type of person) right? Hey… I got suckered into this as well. So
many of the brightest students I teach fell for this. Its not because you are stupid, its because it is
so well done. It is easy to fall for this. Its so easy to get duped with __________ (product /
service) … but the truth is __________ (solution)
When there is no empathy in copy what happens? – No empathy in copy costs conversions. Look
for places to use the copy – “Don’t blame yourself” = empathy
Items that may be too obvious from the start when worded like this:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 7 --

· 	I see you
· 	I hear you
· 	I feel what you are going through
Validation is important for the long term
Short term is important to be seen and heard, overall it is important for the reader to be
understood.
“I understand you” is not the same as “__________ ,____________ and ___________ happens
and look I understand” (the word “look” is used in order for an avatar that needs to be seen, this
keeps a congruent message)
“Look, I hear you” – (this is 2 modalities seen and heard)
mistaken belief + empathy argument
Its so important for you to understand you are not alone in the trenches of battle … If you have
fallen for __________ (product / service) you are actually in really good company. In fact I had
some famous guy that feel for this as well. If he can fall for it … so can you…
Jon started with empathy because it isnt basic. The persuasion quadrant + empathy can be
difficult to grasp. This is why the course started here.
Look for these patterns in copy to see if it is there or missing.
Empathy overkill
It is possible to go into too much empathy in the copy and do this wrong if the whole letter is
“hey you poor baby”
Empathy the right way
This isn’t your fault but now since you know about the solution it is your responsibility to fix it
20:30 – Dovi homework
My body just inst working anymore is better than I’m sick of having to stuff myself with food
every time my insulin gets low
Look for the conversation going in their head
The ultimate answer is to test when there is a question about what headline to use
Look for the right secondary complaint from the reader / avatar
When there is a disagreement between a client and I put it to the test to see what works the best.
Copy chiefing can go wrong – Harlan Kilstein put up some of John Carltons work in a Facebook
group (COC) and plenty of people could not tell where it came from or why it worked. Trust
your research about your avatar and if it comes down to it test for results.
A good way to start a VSL is in “quotes” … “You don’t pay attention to me anymore” as the
headline.
“Body trigger” may be a good way to get attention but there could be a better way to say this.
Jon likes to use the work “trick” a lot. People want a “trick” for this diabetes
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 7 --

Short and chopped copy can be effective – be in the mindset of the avatar and say what they
would say – even references of a song or previous actions.
32:45 Primary goals
Primary goal – The number one thing the avatar dreams of when it comes to this topic – high
top of mind awareness. Take the primary complaint and flip it upside down.
Secondary goals must be tied into the primary goal
Bonuses in a sales letter are meant to trigger the buy into the bonus
weight loss– Running down in beach shore in a bikini getting everyone to stare – this is a
secondary goal. What do they say when they wake up – this is the primary goal.
How to find the primary goal with 1 question
Another way to look at this is – If I could snap my fingers and make one thing come true for you
right now when it comes to __________ what would it be? Their answer is the primary goal.
35:30
Know thy avatar to build the copy correctly
Primary goal formula
I know the one thing you most want to do is __________, I’m here to help you do just that
Know is used on purpose.
[verb] [pronoun] [primary goal] (optional pronoun)
Example:
· 	Lose weight
· 	get your wife back
· 	make it online
· 	nail your presentation
· 	protect yourself from a street attacker
Future tense verbs used in these primary goals
· 	lose
· 	get
· 	make
· 	nail
· 	protect
These are not fancy words
The verb to use is the verb to use in the mind of the prospect – use the forums
“God, I just want to lose weight”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 7 --

“Control your blood sugar”
These are simple phrases.
38:00 – secondary goals
This is where near endless content and sales bullets come from (complaints + mistaken beliefs
as well)
Secondary goal formula:
When you (primary goal), you can also __________
[verb] [pronoun] [secondary goal] (optional pronoun)
Examples:
· 	When you get your wife back you can also __________
· 	I want to walk down the beach feeling fantastic
· 	I want to look in the mirror and love my reflection
· 	I want to get the wrinkles off my face
Primary goals:
Lose weight (primary goal)
· 	Fit back into your skinny jeans (secondary goal)
Fit back 	skinny -
· 	Look and feel younger (secondary goal)
Look 	feel
· 	Reclaim the energy of my youth (secondary goal)
Reclaim assumes something has been lost – energy of your youth
Look for ways to sink words into the bullets covertly that are commends or tie back to the ideals
of the avatar when it comes to their primary goals
Get you wife back (primary goal)
· 	Learn how to seduce her in small ways
Something was missing – why I lost her
· 	Master the art of playful dating
Did I do that? Is that why I lost her?
· 	Discover how to make her feel heard and seen
Discover
This is based on incredible pain – this is the loss of a wife
Think in terms of – this may also be the reason why there was a problem or issue. The small
clues that lead to the real problem for the avatar. What are the possibilities that lead to the
situation they haven’t considered.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 7 --

Make it online (primary goal)
· 	Take dream vacations others lust over (take a dream vacation is ok, learn to use master
verbs like lust to get more attention)
· 	Buy that dream home
· 	Enjoy lifelong respect from your peers (who said it couldn’t be done)
Respect formula
You will not only _________, you will also earn respect from __________ (type of peer),
respect that will last a lifetime.
Secondary goals are really the primary goals – this is the conversation they may be scared to
share. Deep down inside they really want more than the primary goal. The primary goal may be
the easy way to explain it without being made fun of or looking dumb. Goals are confused.
44:15
Talking to people in their language is empathetic copy
Be on the same level as the prospect and feel their pain. Get into their experience
Crossroads close with empathy
“you know what you can do one of two things… you can take this offer or you can continue to
struggle on your own and you know what if you keep going the way you do you are going to lose
respect for yourself and others. You will never gain the respect form your peers. You will never
buy that dream home or take those vacations people lust after.
45:30
Protect yourself from a street attacker (primary goal)
· 	Walk to your car with confidence
· 	Know you can keep your family safe
· 	Reclaim your manhood
As a man I may not worry about walking to my car – women may worry about this
To women – what if you could walk to your car anywhere with confidence
To men – Know that you can keep your family safe
I want to learn street fighting really means – I want to keep my family / wife safe from attacks
Protection should be the primary goal – they don’t say this to themselves
The avatar is talking in code – just reverse it
48;15
Primary + secondary goal formula
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 7 --

“You want to… actually you absolutely need to __________ (primary goal) … and its not jst
because you want to __________ (secondary goal) … or ___________ (secondary goal) or even
__________ (secondary goal)”
(notes for me – not in the class)
This is a stack of information from the buyer.. this is almost like a cold read where you can guess
their problems from the research done.
Primary goal + most probable secondary goal + next probable secondary goal + next common
secondary goal. Start with the most common or probable secondary goal for the mind reading
effect. Use their words and phrases.
(back to the class)
Persuasion quadrant alert
· 	Want
· 	Need
· 	Feel
· 	Validated
Example:
We both want to lose weight. We both have those goals. We also want to feel better. We also
want to look younger and fit back into those sexy high school jeans we used to wear that are
hanging in the closet we thought we would never see again. (empathy)
50:00
“My customers email me all of the time… “Jon, I can FINALLY (secondary goal) now that you
have helped me (primary goal)
“My customers email me all of the time… “Jon, I can FINALLY (fit into my skinny jeans) now
that you have helped me (lose weight)
Copywriting Tip – Putting “quotes” around something draws your eyes towards it
Kick Ass Testimonial Formula:
__________ (Name) I can finally __________ (secondary goal) now that you have helped me
__________ (primary goal)
This is simple to do but vitally important to do
Copypro notes
In copypro make sire there are 3 secondary goals since they are used all of the time.
You want to __________, you want to ___________, you want to __________ that means you
need to __________

Q and A

Judy – How to do the mark ups – needs clarification – done in keynote –
Getting good at the puzzle pieces for copy by looking for complaints and goals written in the
copy. Break copy up and look for the puzzle. This helps put copy into copy pro I have written or
that other have written

56:00 – Elaine – People who get turned off by work that leads to money
One of the reasons copypro has been built is so that picky clients don’t have to be dealt with
Sometimes clients suck – this means I may have to write things for them I don’t want to
That’s not how I would say it… that’s why you hired me because __________ (Jon is aggressive
– you are great at running a business but suck at writing)
The conversation:
Jerk clients
Look let me just level with you. I think you are great at what you do but I don’t you understand
your avatar well because you are too close to it.
Josh – Take responsibility for yourself. Have the tough conversation up front and explain what is
going to be done. This take away blame. Over explain what is going to happen and how it will
happen.
102:15
Have a client intake form and a what to expect form. Push the boundaries here and more money
can be charged
Jons line:
“I will say things that may make you cringe, I will sell your product probably harder than you
will ever feel comfortable. I will do this and the reason why is I will get results. If you want
milque toast results then go find a milque toast copywriter. That is why I charge what I charge.
I go deeper and push the envelope – if you are passionate about something lets meet in the
middle. You are not the writer.. this isnt what you do
More money can be charged when this is explained up front
104:00
Mistake beliefs – can they be thought of as objections from the prospect?
Objections can be dealt with from “Works even if __________”
Some objections can come from mistaken beliefs
